title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 24th March 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Not a great choice; better strong stocks available
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao said Bata is not a great choice as of now. The stock's valuations are attractive after the recent correction, but there are much better financially strong stocks to be purchased. He said avoid Bata.

recommendations.note: Speculative, risky bet as of now
recommendations.detail: Kutumba Rao called Protean a speculative bet that becomes a bit risky as of now. He did not recommend buying it at this time.
